page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Bayesian analysis of allele specific expression
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Bayesian analysis of allele-specific expression (BayesASE) is a complete bioinformatics pipeline that incorporates state-of-the-art error reduction techniques and a flexible Bayesian approach to estimating Allelic imbalance (AI) and formally comparing levels of AI between conditions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Bayesian analysis of allele-specific expression (BayesASE) is a complete bioinformatics pipeline that incorporates state-of-the-art error reduction techniques and a flexible Bayesian approach to estimating Allelic imbalance (AI) and formally comparing levels of AI between conditions.
